title: cassia surattensis subsp. suffruticosa
intro: Cassia surattensis subsp. suffruticosa is a plant species that belongs to the legume family and is commonly known as a shrub or small tree. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, Cassia surattensis subsp. suffruticosa is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and roots are used to make teas, tinctures, and other herbal preparations.
